item.dc:creator: P0sit1veTh0ughts

item.title: Life: "But Wait! There's MORE!"
item.description:
started 2 months ago, been putting away $200 per paycheck for a down payment eventually. Have about a grand socked away. Been rehabbing the credit since the divorce, up to about 680 now.
Sprained his wrist doing 190 lb. (86kg) deadlifts last Friday. How the fsck do you sprain your wrist doing deadlifts? Then car check engine light came on. P0014 and P0017 codes come back. Replaced the Exhaust Oil Control Valve. That cleared the P0014. Swapped the timing sensor, that didn't clear the P0017. Local shop won't do it, recommends the dealership. Take it there, they say it's the timing chain assembly. About $3k for that. So, it's been a $5k week. Gonna pull money from the 401k to pay for it all, because don't have nearly that much in savings. Just a scream into the benthosphere.
Apparently, when you replace the timing chain, you have to replace everything else? *sigh* But, the car as 140k on it, 50k of which are tiny octopus', so it is past time for the recommended swapping. just. ugh. lol. So, how y'all doin?
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: When I see things that’ll help my sons, I post them in a shared album. Now I share them with you. If you disagree or feel differently, please move on and don’t bring the rest of us down. Please like if you do.
item.description:
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice
#anxiety
Integrity
Do it anyway. Be brave.
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice
#depression
Pavlov #CBT
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice

Relationship advice

Anxiety

Dad advice
Success
Believe in yourself
Relationship advice
Easy has a cost
Relationship advice
Validity versus appropriateness
#ILoveYou
Relationship advice
Warmth
Productivity
Friends. Don’t try to do it all yourself.
Relationship advice
It’s okay. Integrity.
Rest is not a reward.
How to apologize.
Confort zone.
Listen to experience.
Touch grass. Sit in the sun.
Seriously. All the time.

item.title: Crows are better at problem solving than a lot of my coworkers.
item.dc:creator: ExistenceIsPainWasTaken

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1142 (eyelashes)
item.description:
I woke up a minute before my alarm. It's absolutely heartbreaking. Let's get this bread.
Someone doesn't belong in the chicken coop.
I would be very surprised to see a Walrus at my door here in Arizona.
*poof*
Accurate.
Spite is a great motivator.
Please?
If I were to get married, I'd be inclined towards the latter. I treated the folks I dated like that, or at least, did in my head. Ah, suddenly I remember part of a dream: for some reason, chalcedony was really good at absorbing zero-point energy for.... something. We were gathering as much as we could to create some sort of weapon against... something?
My bestie and I spent our last hangout watching ancient YouTube videos like this one from our ancient youth.
I try my best to follow Canon Jesus, not Church Jesus.
Sure, I'll take the Dimetrodon as a dog.
Another reason to love Terry Pratchett, incidentally
Oh, the Crisis of the Third Century
Me, right now, working on this meme dump.
Some tropes are as old as time. Also, the title for the Epic of Gilgamesh in Babylonian was awesome: "He who saw the deep."
Speaking of the Gilgamesh story...
The couple that slays together stays together.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [None. I asked him five times, and he just stared at me like I had grown extra heads and then started preening the eyelashes of my left eye and left eyebrow.]
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
such interesting creatures
watch out for Trish
don’t we all
looks like Shang Tsung
shame
bears are cool
the 4 tenets
food companies don’t want you to buy this
the struggle is real
mmm hmm
not cool
yes
they can also sleep in jeans
been way too windy here lately
eggs smell
sign guy must be taking a break
that’s all for me, have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Who needs coffee when you can wake up with a migraine instead?
item.description: Weather triggered a migraine bad enough to wake me up at who-even-knows-o'clock this morning. Got some medication in me and that knocked it back some, but I called in to work just the same. Brains suck. 0/10. Would not recommend. Artist: Baron Engel
